objective: Maximize verified client value per unit of complexity while preserving source truth.

loops.bottleneck: Independent tools can refetch the same site differently
Industry heuristics represented as universal rules
loops.guardrail: UNVERIFIED, DISPUTED, STALE and FALSE cannot create verified recommendations

loops.bottleneck: Raw issue counts and runtime jargon
loops.optimization: Root-cause groups, business impact, owner and verification
loops.guardrail: Engineering detail remains in technical report
loops.verification: Executive and technical reports generated separately

loops.optimization: Contribution ledger with evidence and decisions
loops.guardrail: Do not equate deterministic roles with separate LLM calls

loops.bottleneck: Broad live crawling and silent partials
loops.optimization: Hard URL, depth, host, size and timeout ceilings
loops.guardrail: Truncation and failed fetches remain visible
